title: Browser notification service for Claude input prompts
purpose: Manages browser notifications for Claude's user input requests, handling permission flows and displaying alerts when tabs are not focused.

steps.content: Check if the Notification API is available in the browser.
IF the API is not available, log a warning and return 'denied'.
IF permission is already granted or denied, return the current permission status.
ELSE request permission from the user via the Notification API.
IF permission request succeeds, return the granted permission.
IF permission request fails, log the error and return 'denied'.
Check if the Notification API is available in the browser.
IF the API is not available, log a warning and return undefined.
IF notification permission is not granted, log a warning and return undefined.
ELSE attempt to create a new notification with title, body, icon, and tag.
IF notification creation succeeds, return the notification instance.
IF notification creation fails, log the error and return undefined.
